tasks.label: Build All Platforms
args: set -e && targets=(x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu x86_64-apple-darwin aarch64-apple-darwin) && for t in "${targets[@]}"; do echo "\n==> Building $t" && rustup target add "$t" 2>/dev/null && cargo build --release --target "$t" -p devcontainer-mcp && echo "    ✓ target/$t/release/devcontainer-mcp"; done
